notes.text: This advisory aggregates security fixes for the java-17-openjdk SRPM in CIQ LTS for Rocky Linux 8.6. It addresses 16 CVEs: CVE-2023-21835, CVE-2023-21843, CVE-2023-21930, CVE-2023-21937, CVE-2023-21938, and 11 more.
notes.title: Description

references.summary: Canonical URL for this CSAF document
